arts.ttl: Serie A | Verona v Milan: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: AC Milan's injury woes continue to mount as they prepare to face Hellas Verona in Serie A. The Rossoneri, already grappling with a lengthy list of absentees, have now lost Swiss forward Noah Okafor to a calf problem, ruling him out until next month. arts.ttl: Juventus eye Tomori as Milan outcast contemplates January move
arts.sum: Juventus are actively seeking to bolster their defensive line-up in the upcoming January transfer window, with AC Milan's Fikayo Tomori emerging as a potential target. The English defender, who has found himself on the fringes of Milan's squad under Portuguese coach Paulo Fonseca, is reportedly open to considering a change of scenery. The post Juventus eye Tomori as Milan outcast contemplates January move appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Hellas Verona v AC Milan to kick off matchday 17
arts.sum: Milan have won their last seven Serie A matches against Hellas Verona; the Rossoneri only have a longer open winning run in the competition against Siena (nine, the last of which dates back to 19 May 2013). After conceding two goals in each of the first three matchdays of this championship, Milan have kept a clean sheet in seven of their next 12 Serie A matches; in the competition in this period, only Napoli have more (eight clean sheets, but with one game more than the Rossoneri).

arts.ttl: Juventus Contemplate Going After Milan Outcast Tomori
arts.sum: Juventus will leave no stone unturned to replenish their defense in January and might knock at Milan’s door to inquire about Fikayo Tomori, who has lost his spot in the XI in recent weeks. The two teams arranged Pierre Kalulu’s loan last summer. The post Juventus Contemplate Going After Milan Outcast Tomori appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.
